locations.name: 阿拉伯半岛
locations.summary: 阿拉伯半島（阿拉伯語：شِبْهُ الْجَزِيرَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّة，shibhu l-jazīrati l-ʿarabiyyah意为“阿拉伯半岛”或جَزِيرَةُ الْعَرَب，jazīratu l-ʿara…

relations.subject: 绿喉蜂虎
relations.evidence: A Handbook.|publisher= Princeton University Press|isbn=0-7136-8028-8}} Populations in Africa and the Arabian Peninsula that were formerly assigned to this species (under the name green bee-eater) are now considered to be distinct species, the African green bee-eater and the Arabian green bee-eater. They are mainly insect eaters and they are found in grassland, thin scrub and forest often quite far from water
